name: teshuva-algorithm
description: The Algorithm That Repented — Clippy mascot that explains why you see what you see on social media

scripts.build: npx esbuild extension/content/bundle-entry.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=extension/content/bundle.js && npx esbuild desktop/renderer-entry.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=desktop/renderer.js && npx esbuild extension/background-entry.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=extension/background.js && npx esbuild extension/popup/popup-entry.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=extension/popup/popup.js
scripts.extension: echo Load the extension/ folder in chrome://extensions
